data.goal: From empty hands, gather wood, craft and place one crafting table, craft one wooden pickaxe, mine exactly three stone, and craft one stone pickaxe

data.analysis: Tried to craft oak planks before crafting the crafting table, which violates the guard requiring exactly one table craft and proper ordering. The guard `sp003_exact_one_table_craft_required` indicates that the table must be crafted before any other crafting.
data.suggestion: First gather at least one log, then craft exactly 4 planks (the full recipe from one log), then craft a crafting table from the planks, then place it. Do not attempt any other crafting until the table is placed.
data.new_approach: Gather log -> craft planks (4) -> craft crafting table -> place crafting table -> continue with rest.
